Who We Are

Turning data into
direction.

MIKAEL GLOBAL is a Lagos-based data analysis and web development firm founded by Michael Esan. We bridge the gap between raw data and digital experiences — helping businesses make data-driven decisions while building robust, user-centric web applications.

With a focus on clean architecture, scalable solutions, and actionable analytics, we partner with clients across industries to turn complex problems into elegant, measurable outcomes.

Phone 0906 901 8772
Email mikaelglobal01@gmail.com
Location Lagos, Nigeria (Remote)

Background

The Founder

2026 Founded
Michael Esan
Founder & Lead Developer — MIKAEL GLOBAL
Full-stack developer and data analyst with a passion for building solutions that matter.
Michael combines technical expertise with a deep understanding of business needs — helping companies leverage data and technology for growth. With a background in Water Resources Management at FUNAAB and years of hands-on development experience, he brings a unique perspective to every project: analytical, creative, and results-driven.
